name: Red Lentil Dahl
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the lentils for one hour.
2. Drain and rinse the lentils in cold water.
3. Place the lentils in a 2-quart saucepan. Add water, green chili, salt, and turmeric. Bring to a boil.
4. Lower the heat and simmer for 1½ hours.
5. Melt butter or oil in a small frying pan. Saute the onion until golden brown.
6. Add the sauteed onion and remaining butter or oil to the lentils. Stir well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve with fresh lemon juice and rice, or enjoy it on its own.
VARIATIONS: Instead of onions, try adding half a teaspoon of whole cumin seeds. You can also add mixed vegetables (such as carrots, peas, and potatoes) or green peas to the dish for added flavor and texture.
